content.en:
In the silence of the void of death, a vast treasure ship arrived, passing near the territory of an extradimensional creature.

If it was normal, if the Peak Realm God dared to approach it, he would definitely be killed by it instantly.

However, when it saw the Galan Treasure Ship, it trembled and fled from its lair.

This is the deterrence of the Garanbao ship, and ordinary extradimensional creatures do not dare to attack the Garanbao ship at all.

Soon, the Garanbao ship approached the area of the Realm God Realm, and then stopped at a specific place, which is also the place where it stops every time it comes.

......

Before the arrival of the Garanbao ship, a group of peak realm gods had already arrived here, and then immediately boarded the ship.

Eternal borders.

Ye Tian naturally got the news and knew that the Galanbao ship was coming, so he immediately entered the Death Void from the crack controlled by the human race, and brought almost all the extradimensional resources with him.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled along a safe route and quickly arrived at the location of the Jialanbao ship.

"What a huge treasure ship!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Compared to this Garanbao ship, the boundless sailing ship of the gods of the Sumeru realm is undoubtedly a small wrecked ship, and the difference in its 633 is like the difference between a luxury giant ship and a small wooden ship.

Moreover, the energy emitted by this Ga Lan Treasure Ship far exceeded that of any extradimensional creature he had ever seen in the past, and this Ga Lan Treasure Ship alone was estimated to be able to crush those extradimensional creatures.

"I don't know what level of power is behind this Galanbao ship. "

Ye Tian thought secretly.

Wow!

He came to the entrance of the Garanbao ship, where two pinnacle gods were guarding.

When Ye Tian approached these two peak realm gods, he sensed the terrifying aura on each other's bodies, which was much stronger than himself, such a peak realm god was only guarding the entrance on the Jialan treasure ship, and his status was obviously not very high.

"Please take out the Garanbo card!"

One of the peak realm gods said.

"Two peak realm gods, I didn't apply for the Galanbao card!"

Ye Tian said.

The Gavabo card is a resource card issued by the Gavatar ship, similar to the bank card on the earth, which can store some resources, and the approximate value can be directly displayed through the identification of resources.

In this way, you will know how much net worth each peak realm god brings, and if (afag) is not up to the standard, then naturally you are not allowed to enter the Garanbao ship.

"Come and apply for a Garanbao card with me!"

A pinnacle realm god said.

Ye Tian nodded and followed the other party to apply for a garnanbao card.

Soon, the Jialanbao card was completed, and then asked Ye Tian to put some extra-dimensional resources into it.

Ye Tian did so and put some extra-dimensional resources, but he didn't put all of them.

In an instant, a number appeared on the card.

【87903】

Seeing so many figures, the two peak realm gods were extremely surprised.

"Please come in!"

They no longer blocked Ye Tian and let Ye Tian in.

Although it is strange for a high-level realm god to have so many Garanbao Coins, they are just guarding the gate and don't care about other things, as long as the number of Super Dimensional Treasure Coins exceeds 1,000, they can enter the Garanbao ship to trade.

In this way, Ye Tian easily entered the Jialanbao ship.

......

As soon as he entered the Jialan Treasure Ship, Ye Tian sensed a large number of peak realm gods, as for the high-level realm gods, there were also some here, but the number was very small, they were all brought in by the peak realm gods to see the world, and they didn't really come here to trade.

A voice rang out.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, I didn't expect you to come to the Galanbo ship!"

As soon as the words fell, a figure appeared beside Ye Tian, and it was the god of the Sumeru realm.

"I've seen the gods of the Sumeru realm!"

Ye Tian said politely. []

The Sumeru Realm God stared at Ye Tian, revealing a very puzzled look, "I'm curious, how do you enter the Jialanbao Ship, you can't enter here without a net worth of a thousand Jialanbao coins." And the resources you obtained in the Super Dimensional Treasure Land were less than 1,000 Gala Treasure Coins!"

"I was very lucky, I found a crack passage into the Death Void, and then I entered the Death Void again, and I was lucky enough to find a treasure land, which allowed me to obtain a lot of extradimensional resources. Then he traded with the pinnacle realm god of the Two Realms Gate to obtain the information of the Garlan Treasure Ship, and that's it. Ye Tian said.

However, the gods of the Sumeru realm did not fully believe it.

At this moment, he even suspected that the resources of the super dimensional treasure land had been taken away, and it might even have something to do with Ye Tian.

Of course, he didn't think that the resources of the Super Dimensional Treasure Land were taken by Ye Tian by himself, maybe it was Ye Tian's cooperation with some supreme forces that took away the resources there.

As for the details, he couldn't guess.

However, he can't say anything now, after all, he has no evidence.

Besides, this is the Garanbo ship, no matter who it is, they are not allowed to make trouble here, otherwise they will be severely punished by the Garanbao ship, and they will never be allowed to enter here.

And so.

The god of the Sumeru realm left directly.

Ye Tian also knew that the gods of the Sumeru Realm were suspicious of him, but he felt that it didn't matter.

Soon, he saw the pinnacle realm god of the Two Realms Gate, the multi-dimensional realm god!

At the beginning, he learned the information of the Garlan Treasure Ship from the mouth of the Multidimensional Realm God.

"Ye Tianjie God, you're here!" the Multidimensional Realm God walked over, "The Jialan Treasure Ship will sell all kinds of resources and inheritances, and you can exchange them for the corresponding resource treasures." You can take a look at it and trade when you find the right one. "

"Okay!"

Ye Tianying said.

After that, he wandered around.

There are many places to sell resources on the Garanbo ship, and there are so many resources here, and there are even various inheritances for sale, such as the Perfect Eternal Realm Spiritual Inheritance, which can be sold here, and it only costs more than a hundred Garanbo coins.

Of course, the peak realm gods who came here were all buying the treasures they needed, and it was impossible for them to be willing to take out more than a hundred Gala Treasure Coins to buy a perfect Eternal Realm spiritual art inheritance.

Soon, Ye Tian was attracted by the inheritance.

"Extradimensional Paths"

However, the price of the extra-dimensional Dao species is terrifying.

Just the most ordinary extradimensional Dao inheritance required a full 10,000 Gala Blue Treasure Coins, which ordinary peak realm gods couldn't afford.

Moreover, the inheritance value of ordinary super-dimensional Dao species is not high, and Ye Tian naturally can't look down on it, and those top-level super-dimensional Dao inheritances have reached the level of hundreds of thousands of Galanbao coins.

"Hundreds of thousands of Jialanbao coins, I will take out all the other resources, and it is estimated that I will be able to meet such a standard!"

Ye Tian frowned and thought.

In this way, wouldn't he only be able to buy a top-notch extradimensional Dao inheritance?

Naturally, it won't work, after all, he doesn't need the super-dimensional Dao inheritance yet, and he doesn't understand what the super-dimensional Dao inheritance is.

Subsequently, he spent dozens of Galanbao coins to buy a cultivation information material about the superdimensional path and the superdimensional realm.
